description: Complete MCP server for Tienda Nube (Argentina) and Nuvemshop (Brazil) seller operations — 13 tools for products, orders, customers, categories, coupons, and webhooks with write-back

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products with filters (stock, price, category, date)

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Product detail by ID or SKU with variants and images

tools.name: update_product
tools.description: Update product attributes and variants (price, stock)

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List orders with filters (status, payment, shipping)

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Full order detail with customer, items, tracking

tools.name: update_order_status
tools.description: Close, open, or cancel an order

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List customers with search and filters

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List categories with parent and handle filters

tools.name: create_coupon
tools.description: Create percentage, absolute, or shipping coupon

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List webhooks registered by the app
